5ee3c5365050.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
5ee3c5365050.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
5ee3c5365050.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

bba1cc3f5f75.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
bba1cc3f5f75.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

fc900778d23a.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
fc900778d23a.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
fc900778d23a.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

9d80f4c4e1e4.title: Ranked #2 of 2 locally — peers are ahead
9d80f4c4e1e4.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.
